pattern: Enumerating all valid single-column colorings and counting compatible column-to-column transitions gives a linear-in-width dynamic program.
hints: A column is valid if no two vertically adjacent cells match; there are only a handful of such columns for small heights.
Two consecutive columns are compatible when no cell equals its horizontal neighbor.
Precompute valid columns and their pairwise compatibility, then sweep across the width accumulating counts modulo 1000000007.

stress.description: random small height and modest width
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    m = rng.randint(1, 5)
    n = rng.randint(1, 60)
    return [m, n]
